title: QTS Update Log Feed
description: Schema for updates.json — canonical changelog loaded by index.html loadLogsWithSeed().

$schema.description: Reference back to this schema (optional, for IDE autocomplete).

generated_at.description: ISO timestamp of when this feed was last regenerated.

source_repo.description: Human-readable pointer to the repo the entries originated from.

notes.description: Free-form maintainer notes (not rendered in the UI).

entries.description: Release entries. Renderer sorts newest-first by createdAt.

id.description: Stable unique identifier. Format: log-YYYY-MM-DD-NNN or log-<epoch>-<slug>.

version.description: Semver-ish label (e.g. 2.5.0, 2.5.0-wave1.3). Optional; defaults to 'Custom' in UI when empty.

title.description: Short release headline shown in the entry header.

body.description: Markdown body. Rendered via marked.js + DOMPurify sanitization.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp used for sort order and Published field.
